case_title: UNITED AUTO CREDIT CORPORATION VS. JEANETTE DAWSON

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED AUTO CREDIT CORPORATION
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-21-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JEANETTE DAWSON'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO $150 PER PAY PERIOD, AND THE COURT WILL ENTER AN ORDER ACCORDINGLY. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS ALSO DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS E. A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2012 Off Calendar

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Jeanette Dawson's Claim of Exemption is granted in part. The parties have agreed to $150 per pay period, and the court will enter an order accordingly. The Levying Officer is also directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-08-2010 Assigned To Trial Court
